caption:
ZARA SRPLS – CLLCTN 16 / DROP I 

SRPLS configures the wardrobe as a system: rooted in utility, defined by material, and refined through use. In womenswear, colour drives the evolution. Deployed with precision, it defines the silhouette through clear combinations - green with blue, orange with ecru - before softening into gradients and ombré treatments. These are integrated into familiar forms including workwear trousers, structured tops, and adaptable outer layers, expanding the wardrobe without disrupting its coherence. Fabric and finish remain central, with tactile cottons, treated surfaces, and construction details anchoring each piece in utility.

In kidswear, this widening is expressed through proportion and a refined approach to utility. Silhouettes are set and specific, holding their shape while remaining easy to wear. ZARA AND JOHN GALLIANO ANNOUNCE A TWO-YEAR CREATIVE PARTNERSHIP.
 
Zara announces a two-year creative partnership with John Galliano, who will re-author the brand’s archives through a series of seasonal collections.
 
Mr. Galliano will be working directly with garments from Zara’s past seasons, deconstructing and reconfiguring them into new seasonal expressions and creations.

firstComment: Zara has disrespectful and inefficient customer service in Brazil! For more than a month I have been having conversations through the WhatsApp service channel to redeem a balance regarding a return of items I made in the store. It turns out that when I tried to use the voucher to buy online, I couldn't, I contacted, by 1ª x to report the problem. They only answered me after the expiration date of the voucher had already expired, but the attendant recognised that there was really a balance in my name and in the message he said that I could use the amount of the credit to shop in a physical store or online. But he didn't send me any email or inform me of any new voucher number. He only said that I requested information through WhatsApp to use the credit with a validity of 6 months. It turns out that for more than a month I have been in contact with Zara's service team via WhatsApp, but they insist that I should have received a voucher by email! Isn't it enough to record the history of the attendant's message saying that there is a balance in my name, if the attendant who verified the existence of the credit was able to do it, as the other attendants can't, if all customer movements are recorded in the system registration?! The credit is a sizeable value! I've been a regular customer of Zara for years, I'm trying to release the credit for use, and I've already opened dozens of calls that are not resolved or that they close, if I take 2 minutes to answer, while I have to wait more than 40 minutes for them to answer me! firstComment: Zara has disrespectful and inefficient customer service in Brazil! For more than a month I have been having conversations through the WhatsApp service channel to redeem a balance regarding a return of items I made in the store. It turns out that when I tried to use the voucher to buy online, I couldn't, I contacted, by 1ª x to report the problem. They only answered me after the expiration date of the voucher had already expired, but the attendant recognised that there was really a balance in my name and in the message he said that I could use the amount of the credit to shop in a physical store or online. But he didn't send me any email or inform me of any new voucher number. He only said that I requested information through WhatsApp to use the credit with a validity of 6 months. It turns out that for more than a month I have been in contact with Zara's service team via WhatsApp, but they insist that I should have received a voucher by email! Isn't it enough to record the history of the attendant's message saying that there is a balance in my name, if the attendant who verified the existence of the credit was able to do it, as the other attendants can't, if all customer movements are recorded in the system registration?! The credit is a sizeable value! I've been a regular customer of Zara for years, I'm trying to release the credit for use, and I've already opened dozens of calls that are not resolved or that they close, if I take 2 minutes to answer, while I have to wait more than 40 minutes for them to answer me! Very frustrated, feeling wronged, by a giant company that doesn't need this!!! #ZARACALOTEIRA 🫪😮🤔💩🤡👎

caption:
AARON LEVINE x ZARA

Aaron P. Levine @aaronplevine has been captivated by clothing since the age of four. As a child, he would arrange pieces on the floor, experimenting with colors, textures, and fabrics—never with the intention of wearing them, but simply to observe the dialogue they created together. 

Over the years, he has honed an instinctive mastery for blending items across diverse product categories, assembling looks that feel at once rooted in tradition and refreshingly unexpected. Tailored garments, technical outerwear, denim, knitwear, and trekking boots converge effortlessly under his eye, forming functional, considered outfits suited to virtually any setting.

For him, this practice is more than a craft; it is a lifelong devotion—his profession, and his passion.

#zara #zaraman #aaronlevine
